name: Chicken and Chili Soup
recipeInstructions: In a medium sized saucepan, melt margarine over medium heat. Add onion, garlic, and remaining broth, cooked chicken, chilies, cauliflower, and kidney beans. In a small bowl or cup, combine cornstarch and cold water. Stir in the mixture into the soup in 2 or 3 batches, stirring well after each batch. Store in refrigerator for up to 1-2 days.
